semantic_blueprint.root_cause_hypothesis: Lack of proper ordering of nodes based on their roles when sending requests, which could lead to inefficient query execution.
semantic_blueprint.fix_logic: Introduced a static list of node roles and implemented a method to order shards based on these roles before sending requests.
semantic_blueprint.patch_intent_summary: To ensure that requests are sent to data nodes in an optimal order based on their roles.

hunk_chain.summary: Added import for DiscoveryNodeRole to access node roles.
hunk_chain.connects_to_next: This import is necessary for defining the NODE_QUERY_ORDER in the next hunk.

hunk_chain.summary: Added imports for Comparator and LinkedHashMap to facilitate sorting and maintaining order.
hunk_chain.connects_to_next: These imports are required for the ordering logic implemented in the following hunks.

hunk_chain.summary: Defined a static list of node roles to establish the order in which nodes should be queried.
hunk_chain.connects_to_next: This list is utilized in the ordering logic in the next hunk to determine the priority of nodes.

hunk_chain.summary: Implemented the order method to sort shards based on the roles of their corresponding nodes.
hunk_chain.connects_to_next: This method prepares the ordered list of shards that will be used in the next hunk to send requests.

hunk_chain.summary: Changed the map from HashMap to LinkedHashMap to maintain the order of nodes when selecting requests.

x-pack/plugin/esql/src/main/java/org/ela.code_snippet: private static final List<String> NODE_QUERY_ORDER = List.of(
final Map<DiscoveryNode, List<ShardId>> nodeToShardIds = new LinkedHashMap<>();

adapted_code_hunks.hunk_text: @@ -57,6 +57,20 @@ * and executing these computes on the data nodes. */ abstract class DataNodeRequestSender { + + /** + * Query order according to the + * node roles. + */ + private static final List NODE_QUERY_ORDER = List.of( + DiscoveryNodeRole.SEARCH_ROLE.roleName(), + DiscoveryNodeRole.DATA_CONTENT_NODE_ROLE.roleName(), + DiscoveryNodeRole.DATA_HOT_NODE_ROLE.roleName(), + DiscoveryNodeRole.DATA_WARM_NODE_ROLE.roleName(), + DiscoveryNodeRole.DATA_COLD_NODE_ROLE.roleName(), + DiscoveryNodeRole.DATA_FROZEN_NODE_ROLE.roleName() + ); + private final TransportService transportService; private final Executor esqlExecutor; private final CancellableTask rootTask;
